recommendations.title: Angry Annie
recommendations.overview: Annie becomes pregnant. Since she doesn't want to keep the child, she meets a movement that performs illegal abortions. But, in the seventies, Annie will encounter allies and opponents along the way.

recommendations.title: Autumn Dreams

recommendations.title: Annie

recommendations.title: Sharper
recommendations.overview: A small, wealthy family in New York City gets progressively torn apart by secrets, lies, and the theft that orchestrates all of it.

recommendations.title: Bob Trevino Likes It
recommendations.overview: Lily Trevino unexpectedly befriends an online stranger who shares her self-centered father’s name. This new Bob Trevino’s support could transform her life.

recommendations.title: Father of the Bride
recommendations.overview: George Banks is an ordinary, middle-class man whose 22 year-old daughter Annie has decided to marry a man from an upper-class family, but George can't think of what life would be like without his daughter. His wife tries to make him happy for Annie,

recommendations.title: The Remarkable Life of Ibelin
recommendations.overview: The secret life of a young World of Warcraft gamer is vividly reimagined when his online friends contact his family after his death.

recommendations.title: Cyberbully
recommendations.overview: A woman tries to help her teenage daughter when she becomes the victim of online bullying.
